results.subject: Meeting with Dr. Michael Johnson
results.original_body: Hi Bob, I have a meeting scheduled with Dr. Michael Johnson on March 15th at 2 PM. His office is located at 456 Medical Center Drive, Los Angeles, CA 90210. You can reach him at (555) 987-6543 or email him at mjohnson@medical.com. Please prepare the quarterly report for our discussion.
